subcodes.first_line: Your letter was received and its contents were noted. It behoveth one such as you to [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مکتوب شما واصل گردید و بر مضمون اطلاع حاصل گشت امثال آنجناب سزاوار چنانست که
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @courtesy; culture [adab], @consultation, @contention and conflict
